title: Zusz's CoffeeCraft
description: A simple mod, that adds coffee to minecraft!
body:
# ☕ Zusz’s Coffee Craft Brew flavor into your Minecraft world! **Zusz’s Coffee Craft** is a charming little mod that transforms your adventures with coffee plants, tools, drinks, and quirky structures—perfect for players who enjoy immersive, homely touches in Minecraft. *** ## ✨ Mod Features * **Three Coffee Types**: Arabica, Robusta, Liberica * **Roasting Levels**: Raw, Light, Medium, Dark * **Brewing System**: Nine distinct coffee variants (combining roast and bean type) * **Interactive Items**: Coffee machine, coffee cups * **Special Structure**: Coffee Hut—a little world-gen building with coffee bushes and brewing essentials (variants: Basic, Dark, Big) * **Villager Integration**: Trade coffee items with villagers * **JEI Integration**: Recipe viewing support (occasional glitches) *** ## 🌍 Versions 1.20.6 (NeoForge) 1.20.4 (NeoForge) 1.20.1 (Forge) 1.19.4 (Forge, up to 1.1.0) *** ## 📜 Version Highlights (Changelog) | Version |What's New | | ---------------------------- |----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | 1.4.1 |• Introduced two new Achievements
• Revamped villager trades | | 1.4.0 |• Stackable, placeable coffee cups (Place with Sneak + Right-click; Pick up with Right-click)
• Coffee bushes now grow when bonemealed (one stage at a time)
• Added coffee grinder block (non-functional and creative-only; future use hinted) | | 1.3.1 (Hotfix) |• Added JEI recipes for Liberica coffee
• Fixed Coffee Huts generating with open doors (fixed loot table mishap) | | 1.3.0 (Liberica Update) |• New Liberica bean line (bush, cherry, beans, ground forms, cup)
• Adjusted Coffee Hut loot tables
• Expanded Liberica-related villager trades (farmer, wandering trader)
• Beans now smelt in half the time
• Grinded coffee recipe changed from 9 to 6 beans
• Liberica coffee grants a Strength effect | | 1.2.0 (Coffee Cherry Update) |• Added Arabica and Robusta coffee cherries
• Coffee bushes now drop cherries instead of raw beans
• Cherries craft into raw beans
• Grinded coffee recipe adjusted from 9 to 6 beans | | 1.1.0 (Robusta Update) |• Introduced Robusta coffee items (bush, beans, ground coffee, cups)
• Cold-biome “Dark” Coffee Hut featuring Robusta bushes
• Large Coffee Hut variant with both coffee types and extra loot
• Added additional villager trades and JEI integration | | 1.0.1 (Hotfix) |• Fixed Coffee Hut generation bug | | 1.0.0 (First Release) |• Introduced coffee machine, cup, Arabica line, Coffee Hut, villager trades, JEI compatibility | *** ## ⚠️ Important Note As of **May 30, 2025**, **Zusz’s Coffee Craft** has been officially **discontinued** in favor of a brand-new project. Thank you all for **1,000+ downloads** and the amazing support—you made this mod a success! I hope you enjoyed the experience as much as I enjoyed creating it. ❤️ *** ## 🌟 Looking Ahead: Zusz’s CoffeeCraft2: ReBrewed Introducing the next chapter: **Zusz’s CoffeeCraft2: ReBrewed**—a reimagined successor bringing fresh mechanics and deeper coffee gameplay. ### ☕ New Features: * **264 unique coffee combinations** * A brand-new **caffeine system** with perks and side-effects * **Dynamic brewing**, where ingredients truly matter * Full **JEI integration** for recipes and results * And more exciting content on the way! Available for neoforge 1.21.0 and 1.21.1 👉 **Check it out here:** [Zusz’s CoffeeCraft2: ReBrewed on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zcoffeecraft2) ## 🔗 Links **Zusz's CoffeeCraft2: ReBrewed** * [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/zuszs-coffeecraft2-rebrewed) * [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zuszs-coffeecraft2-rebrewed) **Original Zusz's CoffeeCraft** * [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/zuszscoffeecraft) * [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zuszs-coffee-craft) **Zusz's Lil Donuts** * [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/zuszs-lil-donuts) * [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zuszs-lil-donuts)
